text.title: Audience Driven Pivot Decision Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion that references a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for Audience Driven Pivot Decision.

decision-tree.root-question: Do ALL Applies-If conditions hold AND NO Skip-If condition triggers for this engagement?

conclusion.verdict: precondition not met; route to a different methodology or skip.
hard skip condition triggered; do not apply.
apply rule audience-asset-required from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule evidence-of-unsolved-jobs from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule explicit-kill-criterion-old-product from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.
apply rule validation-before-build from 01-core-rules.xml and emit artefact.

text.example: Engagement passes applies_if, none of skip_if match. The first non-skip rule signal evaluates to true → conclusion routes to that rule id → agent draft enforces the rule and attaches matching evidence.
